case_title: C & C SF OFFICE OF TREASURER TAX COLLECTOR VS. RICHARD MILOS

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF C & C SF OFFICE OF TREASURER TAX COLLECTOR
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY C & C SF OFFICE OF TREASURER TAX COLLECTOR AS TO DEFENDANT MILOS, RICHARD ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-04-2014 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF WAS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (D-506)
